base.$description: Default design grid for both icons and image-style pictograms.

display.$description: Common board display size. Assets should remain legible when reduced to 24px.

default.$description: Preferred rectangle stroke thickness for border-style icons.

minimum.$description: Fallback thickness only when 2px cannot express the shape clearly.

rasterScale.$description: Minimum source/export multiplier for jpg or png assets before rendering down.

square.$description: Default icon/image ratio used by the board's 24, 40, 48, 60, and 94px assets.

brandLogoEnergyx.$description: Observed img_logo_energyx ratio from the 154x24 brand mark.

iconPrefix.$description: Interactive or font/SVG-delivered icon asset prefix.

variantSeparator.$description: Variant path separator used for states and directions.

delivery.$description: Icons are fontized in product, but handed off to development as SVG files.

tone.$description: Single-tone icons are preferred. Duotone artwork should be handed off as img_*.

stylePriority.$description: Border icons are preferred; filled variants may be paired when needed.

delivery.$description: Image assets may be SVG or raster depending on fixed colors and artwork complexity.

defaultRatio.$description: Most image assets on the board are square.
